dialogue_turns.content: Hi! My name is Olivia. Nice to meet you!
Nice to meet you too, Olivia! How can I help you today?
I work as a bioinformatics researcher. I've been doing this for a few years now.
That's great! A bioinformatics researcher — sounds interesting. What kind of things do you work on?
By the way, I'm also interested in philosophy.
You're welcome! Let me know if you need anything else.
You're welcome! Let me know if you need anything else.
